name: Sample Resume 1
content:
Senior Software Engineer with 8 years of experience in full-stack development. Proficient in Python, Java, and JavaScript. Expert in microservices architecture, cloud infrastructure, and DevOps. Led teams of 5-10 engineers. Strong background in agile development and continuous integration/deployment.

Technical Skills:
- Languages: Python, Java, JavaScript, Go, SQL
- Frameworks: Django, Spring Boot, React, FastAPI
- Cloud Platforms: AWS, Google Cloud, Azure
- Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Elasticsearch
- Tools: Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, GitHub Actions

Experience:
- TechCorp Inc (2018-Present): Led development of microservices platform serving 10M+ users
- StartupXYZ (2016-2018): Built real-time analytics system handling 100K events/second
- DataSystems Corp (2015-2016): Implemented machine learning pipeline for recommendation engine

name: Sample Resume 2
content:
Product Manager with 6 years of experience in B2B SaaS. Proven track record of launching 5+ successful products. Strong data analytics and user research skills. Experienced in cross-functional collaboration and go-to-market strategies.

Core Competencies:
- Product Strategy & Roadmapping
- User Research & Analytics
- Stakeholder Management
- Agile & Scrum
- Go-to-Market Strategy
- Data Analysis

Experience:
- CloudTech Solutions (2020-Present): Product Manager for Analytics Platform - grew ARR from $500K to $3M
- GrowthLabs (2018-2020): Senior Product Manager - managed 3-engineer team, launched 2 new products
- ConsultCorp (2017-2018): Associate Product Manager - supported product launches for enterprise clients

name: Sample Resume 3
content:
Data Scientist with 5 years of experience in machine learning and statistical analysis. Specializing in NLP, computer vision, and recommendation systems. Published 3 research papers in peer-reviewed journals.

Technical Stack:
- Programming: Python, R, SQL, Scala
- ML Frameworks: TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn, XGBoost
- Big Data: Spark, Hadoop, Hive
- Visualization: Tableau, Matplotlib, Plotly
- Deployment: MLflow, Kubeflow, Airflow

Key Projects:
- Built NLP model for document classification achieving 96% accuracy
- Developed recommendation engine increasing user engagement by 35%
- Implemented computer vision system for automated quality control

name: Sample Resume 4
content:
DevOps Engineer with 7 years of experience in infrastructure automation and cloud deployment. Expert in Kubernetes, containerization, and CI/CD pipelines. Improved system uptime from 99.5% to 99.99% through infrastructure optimization.

Core Expertise:
- Infrastructure as Code: Terraform, CloudFormation, Ansible
- Container Orchestration: Kubernetes, Docker Swarm
- CI/CD: Jenkins, GitLab CI, GitHub Actions, ArgoCD
- Monitoring: Prometheus, Grafana, ELK Stack
- Cloud Platforms: AWS, Azure, Google Cloud

Accomplishments:
- Automated deployment pipeline reducing deployment time from 2 hours to 15 minutes
- Designed and implemented disaster recovery plan with RTO of 1 hour
- Mentored 3 junior engineers on Kubernetes best practices

name: Sample Resume 5
content:
Frontend Engineer with 4 years of experience building responsive web applications. Expertise in modern JavaScript frameworks and CSS. Focus on performance optimization and user experience.

Technologies:
- JavaScript Frameworks: React, Vue.js, Angular
- Styling: CSS3, SASS, Tailwind CSS, Material-UI
- Build Tools: Webpack, Vite, Parcel
- Testing: Jest, React Testing Library, Cypress
- Performance: Web Vitals optimization, Code splitting

Projects:
- Redesigned company dashboard reducing load time by 60%
- Implemented component library used across 10+ applications
- Led performance optimization initiative improving accessibility score to 98
